name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Mini Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
